emails.subject: Deal Number 109660
emails.body: Mark has informed me that one of you would handle anything prior to 5/00 on Oasis. Please see below. Let me know if I need to provide further information. Thanks! Karen Forwarded by Karen Lindley/Corp/Enron on 08/11/2000 04:01 PM From: Karen Lindley 08/10/2000 03:38 PM

emails.subject: Re: Deal Number 109660
emails.body: Re: Deal Number 109660 This transport ticket should have been entered under ENA, instead of HPL. However, the pathing in Unify is correct. HPL sold 30,000 on th 15th to ENA, who then transported it to mtr 628 on Oasis for .015. Daren Enron North America Corp. From: Karen Lindley ENRON 08/11/2000 04:06 PM
